voice.personality: speaks to those who compete to win — not just participate
do: Use crown, throne, sovereignty, strike imagery
Make it feel like there's only first place
sample_phrases: The crown doesn't fall. It strikes.
Built for those who finish first.

aida.attention_hook: a bold challenge or competitive truth that stops the scroll
aida.interest: what Crownstrike gives competitors that others don't have
aida.desire: the feeling of being at the top — the app that got you there
